title: sphaerocyperus erinaceus
intro: Sphaerocyperus erinaceus, also known as the hedgehog club moss or spike moss, is a type of small, perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal and antibacterial properties, which can aid in wound healing and skin infections. The health benefits of Sphaerocyperus erinaceus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health conditions.
